title: Crispy Rich Slovakian Cabbage Stir-fry
description: A weeknight dish featuring a rich and crunchy cabbage stir-fry, perfect for pescatarians seeking a deliciously simple meal.
instructions: Chop the cabbage into strips, onions finely and peppers roughly.
If using dumplings, boil them until tender. If not, sauté the onion in olive oil until translucent.
Add garlic cloves to the pan, cooking until fragrant. Then add diced cabbage, stirring well to combine with the aromatics.
Pour tomato sauce or paste over the vegetables and cook for 2-3 minutes to allow it to absorb flavors.
If using peppers, add them now; stir occasionally as they begin to soften.
When all ingredients are combined and the sauce is thickened slightly, taste and adjust seasoning if needed. Optionally sprinkle with salt.
Serve hot. You can garnish with fresh herbs like parsley or chives for a pop of color.
